title: Archaic Tooth
description: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] a starter card with an ancient version.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Upon pickup, transforms one of five specific starter cards into its ancient version: Bash → Break, Neutralize → Suppress, Unleash → Protector, Falling Star → Meteor Shower, or Dualcast → Quadcast. If a matching starter card is found in the player's deck, it's automatically selected. Card upgrades and enchantments are preserved during transformation. If no matching starter card is in the deck, the relic transforms into Doubt instead.
